events.name: TILE_CLICK
events.description: Emits UI:{tileClickEvent} with { x, y } on tile click

events.name: UNIT_CLICK
events.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click

events.name: MOVE
events.description: Emitted when a car moves to a new tile

events.name: LAP_COMPLETE
events.description: Emitted when a lap is completed

events.name: PLAY_AGAIN
events.description: Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

overridableConfigKeys.label: Features
overridableConfigKeys.description: Track features (pit markers, start line, etc.)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Tiles
overridableConfigKeys.description: Road circuit + grass infield tiles (8x8 rectangular track)
